name: @yksanjo/codex-conductor
description: Codex-first cockpit and MCP server for local Codex sessions: read ~/.codex transcripts, group work by status, and drive managed tmux sessions behind an irreversibility gate.

scripts.test: node codex.test.js && CONDUCTOR_DEFAULT_ADAPTER=claude-code node test.js && node policy.test.js && node fleet.test.js && node adapters/mev-searcher.test.js && node adapters/validator-fleet.test.js && node adapters/sales.test.js && CONDUCTOR_DEFAULT_ADAPTER=claude-code node mcp.test.js && CONDUCTOR_DEFAULT_ADAPTER=claude-code node manage.test.js && CONDUCTOR_DEFAULT_ADAPTER=claude-code node server.test.js && node server.fleet.test.js && CONDUCTOR_DEFAULT_ADAPTER=claude-code node seat.test.js && CONDUCTOR_DEFAULT_ADAPTER=claude-code node seat.e2e.test.js
